


```{r, out.width = "100%", out.height="100%", fig.align = "center", echo = F}
#use knit to add the pdf
knitr::include_graphics("files/certificates/data_scientist_with_r.jpg")
```

```{r, echo = F}
#use knit to add the pdf
knitr::include_graphics("files/certificates/intro_to_bigdata.jpg")
```

```{r, echo = F}
#use knit to add the pdf
knitr::include_graphics("files/certificates/big_data_modeling.jpg")
```
```{r, echo = F}
#use knit to add the pdf
knitr::include_graphics("files/certificates/multivariate_calculus_page.jpg")
```

```{r echo = F}
#use knit to add the pdf
knitr::include_graphics("files/certificates/linear_algebra_page.jpg")
```
